title: stachys germanica var. spectabilis
intro: Stachys germanica var. spectabilis, also known as the tall betony, is a perennial plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. It is a type of herb that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory qualities. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of digestive issues. Traditionally, tall betony is prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and has also been used in folk medicine to treat a range of ailments.
